name: Mealie
description: A Place for All Your Recipes
compose:
name: slashnode-mealie
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/mealie-recipes/mealie:v3.20.0
    container_name: mealie
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      ALLOW_SIGNUP: 'true'
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
      MAX_WORKERS: '1'
      WEB_CONCURRENCY: '1'
    volumes:
      - web_data:/app/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:9925:9000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data:
    name: slashnode-mealie_web_data
